name: Adult Deep Dragon
speed: walk 40 ft., burrow 30 ft., fly 80 ft., swim 40 ft.
senses: Blindsight 60 ft., Darkvision 150 ft., passive Perception 21

traits.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day, or 4/Day in Lair)
entries: If the dragon fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The dragon makes three Rend attacks.

actions.name: Rend
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: 9, reach 10 ft. 14 (2d8 + 5) Slashing damage plus 5 (1d10) Poison damage.

actions.name: Nightmare Breath 5
entries: wis DC 15, each creature in a 30-foot Cone [Area of Effect]. 38 (7d10) Psychic damage, and the target has the Frightened condition until the end of the dragon's next turn. {@actSaveSuccess Half damage only.

bonusActions.name: Shape-Shift
entries: The dragon shape-shifts into a Small or Medium Humanoid or a Small or Medium Beast, or it returns to its true form. Its game statistics, other than its size, are the same in each form. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying isn't transformed.

legendaryActions.name: Pounce
entries: The dragon moves up to half its Speed, and it makes one Rend attack.

legendaryActions.name: Spore Salvo
entries: con DC 15, one creature within 30 feet of the dragon that it can see. 13 (3d8) Poison damage, and the target has the Poisoned condition. It repeats the save at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. After 1 minute, it succeeds automatically. {@actSaveSuccessOrFail The dragon can't take this action again until the start of its next turn.

name: Adult Spirit Dragon
speed: walk 40 ft., burrow 30 ft., fly 80 ft.
senses: Blindsight 30 ft., Darkvision 120 ft., passive Perception 17

traits.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day, or 4/Day in Lair)
entries: If the dragon fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
entries: The dragon casts one of the following spells, requiring no spell components and using Intelligence as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 18):

At will: Detect Magic, Shapechange (Beast or Humanoid form only, no Temporary Hit Points gained from the spell, and no Concentration or Temporary Hit Points required to maintain the spell), Thunderwave
1/day: Legend Lore (as an action)

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The dragon makes three Rend attacks. It can replace one attack with a use of (A) Time-Warping Breath or (B) Spellcasting to cast Thunderwave.

actions.name: Rend
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: 11, reach 10 ft. 15 (2d8 + 6) Slashing damage plus 7 (2d6) Necrotic damage.

actions.name: Ruinous Breath 5
entries: con DC 18, each creature in a 60-foot Cone [Area of Effect]. 63 (14d8) Necrotic damage. {@actSaveSuccess Half damage.

actions.name: Time-Warping Breath
entries: wis DC 18, each creature that isn't currently affected by this breath in a 60-foot Cone [Area of Effect]. The target's Speed is halved, it can't take Reactions, and it can take either an action or a Bonus Action on its turn, not both. It repeats the save at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. After 1 minute, it succeeds automatically.

legendaryActions.name: Pounce
entries: The dragon moves up to half its Speed, and it makes one Rend attack.

legendaryActions.name: Shattering Wave
entries: The dragon uses Spellcasting to cast Thunderwave.

legendaryActions.name: Unearth Ruins
entries: The dragon magically raises broken, ancient ruins in a 20-foot-radius, 60-foot-high Cylinder [Area of Effect] centered on a point it can see within 120 feet. Ground in the Cylinder [Area of Effect] becomes Difficult Terrain. Each creature in the Cylinder [Area of Effect] when it appears is subjected to the following effect. str DC 18. 5 (2d4) Bludgeoning damage, and the target has the Prone condition. {@actSaveSuccessOrFail The dragon can't take this action again until the start of its next turn.

name: Ancient Deep Dragon
speed: walk 40 ft., burrow 40 ft., fly 80 ft., swim 40 ft.
senses: Blindsight 60 ft., Darkvision 300 ft., passive Perception 26

traits.name: Legendary Resistance (4/Day, or 5/Day in Lair)
entries: If the dragon fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The dragon makes three Rend attacks.

actions.name: Rend
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: 12, reach 15 ft. 17 (2d10 + 6) Slashing damage plus 5 (1d10) Poison damage.

actions.name: Nightmare Breath 5
entries: wis DC 20, each creature in a 90-foot Cone [Area of Effect]. 44 (8d10) Psychic damage, and the target has the Frightened condition until the end of the dragon's next turn. {@actSaveSuccess Half damage only.

bonusActions.name: Shape-Shift
entries: The dragon shape-shifts into a Small or Medium Humanoid or a Small or Medium Beast, or it returns to its true form. Its game statistics, other than its size, are the same in each form. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying isn't transformed.

legendaryActions.name: Pounce
entries: The dragon moves up to half its Speed, and it makes one Rend attack.

legendaryActions.name: Spore Salvo
entries: con DC 20, one creature within 30 feet of the dragon that it can see. 16 (3d10) Poison damage, and the target has the Poisoned condition. It repeats the save at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. After 1 minute, it succeeds automatically. {@actSaveSuccessOrFail The dragon can't take this action again until the start of its next turn.

name: Ancient Spirit Dragon
speed: walk 40 ft., burrow 30 ft., fly 80 ft.
senses: Blindsight 60 ft., Darkvision 120 ft., passive Perception 21

traits.name: Legendary Resistance (4/Day, or 5/Day in Lair)
entries: If the dragon fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
entries: The dragon casts one of the following spells, requiring no spell components and using Intelligence as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 22):

At will: Detect Magic, Shapechange (Beast or Humanoid form only, no Temporary Hit Points gained from the spell, and no Concentration or Temporary Hit Points required to maintain the spell), Thunderwave (level 2 version)
1e/day: Legend Lore (as an action), Sequester

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The dragon makes three Rend attacks. It can replace one attack with a use of (A) Time-Warping Breath or (B) Spellcasting to cast Thunderwave (level 2 version).

actions.name: Rend
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: 15, reach 15 ft. 19 (2d10 + 8) Slashing damage plus 9 (2d8) Necrotic damage.

actions.name: Ruinous Breath 5
entries: con DC 22, each creature in a 90-foot Cone [Area of Effect]. 72 (16d8) Necrotic damage. {@actSaveSuccess Half damage.

actions.name: Time-Warping Breath
entries: wis DC 22, each creature that isn't currently affected by this breath in a 90-foot Cone [Area of Effect]. The target's Speed is halved, it can't take Reactions, and it can take either an action or a Bonus Action on its turn, not both. It repeats the save at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. After 1 minute, it succeeds automatically.

legendaryActions.name: Pounce
entries: The dragon moves up to half its Speed, and it makes one Rend attack.

legendaryActions.name: Shattering Wave
entries: The dragon uses Spellcasting to cast Thunderwave (level 2 version).

legendaryActions.name: Unearth Ruins
entries: The dragon magically raises broken, ancient ruins in a 20-foot-radius, 60-foot-high Cylinder [Area of Effect] centered on a point it can see within 120 feet. Ground in the Cylinder [Area of Effect] becomes Difficult Terrain. Each creature in the Cylinder [Area of Effect] when it appears is subjected to the following effect. str DC 22. 13 (3d8) Bludgeoning damage, and the target has the Prone condition. {@actSaveSuccessOrFail The dragon can't take this action again until the start of its next turn.

name: Aranea
speed: walk 30 ft., climb 30 ft. (spider or hybrid form only)

traits.name: Spider Climb (Hybrid or Spider Form Only)
entries: The aranea can climb difficult surfaces, including along ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

traits.name: Web Walker
entries: The aranea ignores movement restrictions caused by webs, and it knows the location of any other creature in contact with the same web.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
entries: The aranea casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 12):
At will: Friends, Silent Image
1/day: Hold Person

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The aranea makes two attacks, using Bite, Slam, or Sling in any combination.

actions.name: Bite (Hybrid or Spider Form Only)
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: 5, reach 5 ft. 6 (1d6 + 3) Piercing damage plus 2 (1d4) Poison damage.

actions.name: Slam
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: 5, reach 5 ft. 7 (1d8 + 3) Bludgeoning damage.

actions.name: Sling (Humanoid or Hybrid Form Only)
entries: Ranged Weapon Attack: 5, range 30/120 ft. 8 (2d4 + 3) Bludgeoning damage.

bonusActions.name: Shape-Shift
entries: The aranea shape-shifts into a humanoid form, into a humanoid-spider hybrid form, or back into its true spider form. Its game statistics are the same in each form, except where noted. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying isn't transformed.

name: Beast of Malar
speed: walk 50 ft., burrow 40 ft. (land form only), fly 60 ft. (sky form only), swim 40 ft. (sea form only)

traits.name: Amphibious (Sea Form Only)
entries: The beast breathes air and water.

traits.name: Divine Immortality
entries: If the beast dies, its body dissolves into black goo, and it gains a new body after 1d10 days, reviving with all its Hit Points in a place of Malar's choosing.

traits.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day)
entries: If the beast fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

traits.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The beast has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

traits.name: Regeneration
entries: The beast regains 20 Hit Points at the start of its turn. If the beast takes Radiant damage or damage from a Critical Hit, this trait doesn't function at the start of the beast's next turn. The beast dies only if it starts its turn with 0 Hit Points and doesn't regenerate.

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The beast makes three attacks, using Bite or Claws in any combination.

actions.name: Bite
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: 9, reach 5 ft. 23 (4d8 + 5) Piercing damage.

actions.name: Claws (Land or Sky Form Only)
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: 9, reach 5 ft. 18 (3d8 + 5) Slashing damage. If the target is Large or smaller, it has the Prone condition.

bonusActions.name: Recuperative Shape-Shift
entries: The beast shape-shifts into its land form, sea form, or sky form and regains 9 (2d8) Hit Points. Its game statistics are the same in each form, except where noted. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying isn't transformed.

name: Biha Babir
speed: walk 30 ft., fly 60 ft., swim 90 ft.
senses: Blindsight 30 ft., Darkvision 120 ft., passive Perception 17

traits.name: Amphibious
entries: Biha Babir can breathe air and water.

traits.name: Elemental Restoration
entries: If Biha Babir dies outside the Elemental Plane of Water, her body dissolves into brine, and she gains a new body in 1d4 days, reviving with all her Hit Points somewhere on the Plane of Water.

traits.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day)
entries: If Biha Babir fails a saving throw, she can choose to succeed instead.

traits.name: Wishes
entries: Biha Babir knows the Wish spell but can cast it only on behalf of a non-genie creature who communicates a wish in a way Biha Babir can understand. If Biha Babir casts the spell for a creature, she suffers none of the spell's stress. Once Biha Babir has cast it three times, she can't do so again for 365 days.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
entries: Biha Babir casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 17):
At will: Create or Destroy Water, Detect Magic, Major Image
2e/day: Control Water (Flood, Part Water, or Redirect Flow only), Dispel Magic, Invisibility
1e/day: Control Weather, Plane Shift

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: Biha Babir makes two Marine Burst attacks. She can replace one of these attacks with a Tail attack.

actions.name: Marine Burst
entries: Melee Weapon or Ranged Weapon Attack: 10, reach 5 ft. or range 60 ft. 17 (2d10 + 6) Cold damage.

actions.name: Tail (Marid Form Only)
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: 10, reach 15 ft. 13 (2d6 + 6) Bludgeoning damage, and if the target is Huge or smaller, it has the Prone condition.

bonusActions.name: Fluid Form
entries: Biha Babir shape-shifts into a form resembling a Beast or Humanoid that is Medium or smaller, while retaining her game statistics (other than her size), or returns to her true marid form.

legendaryActions.name: Misty Burst
entries: Biha Babir teleports to an unoccupied space she can see within 30 feet of herself and makes one Marine Burst attack.

legendaryActions.name: Whirlpool
entries: str DC 18, each creature in a 30-foot Emanation [Area of Effect] originating from Biha Babir. 10 (3d6) Force damage, and the target is pulled 15 feet straight toward Biha Babir. Biha Babir can't use this action again until the start of her next turn.

traits.name: Determined Survivor
entries: The cultist regains 10 Hit Points at the start of each of its turns if it is Bloodied and has at least 1 Hit Points.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
entries: The cultist casts one of the following spells, using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 16):
1/day: Dominate Person
2e/day: Calm Emotions, Detect Thoughts

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The cultist makes three attacks, using Gauntlet or Oppressive Burst in any combination. It can replace one attack with a use of Spellcasting to cast Dominate Person, if available.

actions.name: Gauntlet
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: 8, reach 5 ft. 17 (3d8 + 4) Bludgeoning damage.

actions.name: Oppressive Burst
entries: Ranged Weapon Attack: 8, range 120 ft. 16 (2d10 + 5) Psychic damage, and the target can't take Reactions until the start of the cultist's next turn.

reactions.name: Counterattack
entries: The cultist is hit by an attack roll. {@actResponse The cultist makes one Gauntlet or Oppressive Burst attack against the triggering creature.

traits.name: Blood-Soaked Resolve
entries: While Bloodied, the cultist has Advantage on saving throws.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
entries: The cultist casts one of the following spells, using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 14):
2/day: Mind Spike
1e/day: Dimension Door, Mislead

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The cultist makes three Cursed Blade attacks. It can replace one of these attacks with a use of Spellcasting.

actions.name: Cursed Blade
entries: Melee Weapon or Ranged Weapon Attack: 7 (with Advantage if the target doesn't have all its Hit Points), reach 5 ft. or range 20/80 ft. 14 (3d6 + 4) Slashing damage. The blade magically returns to the cultist's hand immediately after a ranged attack.

traits.name: Nearer to the Dead
entries: While Bloodied, the cultist has Immunity to the Frightened and Poisoned conditions.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
entries: The cultist casts one of the following spells, using Intelligence as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 17):
At will: Speak with Dead, Thaumaturgy
1e/day: Animate Dead, Circle of Death

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The cultist makes three Necrotic Burst attacks.

actions.name: Necrotic Burst
entries: Melee Weapon or Ranged Weapon Attack: 9, reach 5 ft. or range 120 ft. 27 (5d10) Necrotic damage and the target can't regain Hit Points until the end of the cultist's next turn.

traits.name: Culling Aura
entries: con DC 20, each Bloodied creature in a 30-foot Emanation [Area of Effect] originating from the scion at the end of the scion's turn. The target can't regain Hit Points until the start of the scion's next turn.

traits.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day)
entries: If the scion fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

traits.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The scion has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
entries: The scion casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 20):
At will: Detect Thoughts, Dispel Magic
2e/day: Dimension Door, Invisibility, Scrying
1e/day: Circle of Death, Create Undead

spellcasting.name: Command
entries: The scion casts Command (level 2 version), using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting. The scion can't take this action again until the start of its next turn.

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The scion makes two attacks, using Death Touch or Mindwrack Bolt in any combination.

actions.name: Death Touch
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: 12, reach 5 ft. 25 (4d8 + 7) Necrotic damage.

actions.name: Mindwrack Bolt
entries: Ranged Weapon Attack: 12, range 120 ft. 21 (6d6) Psychic damage and the target has the Poisoned condition until the start of the scion's next turn.

legendaryActions.name: Attack
entries: The scion makes a Death Touch or Mindwrack Bolt attack.

name: Deep Dragon Wyrmling
speed: walk 30 ft., burrow 15 ft., fly 60 ft., swim 30 ft.
senses: Blindsight 10 ft., Darkvision 60 ft., passive Perception 15

actions.name: Rend
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: 4, reach 5 ft. 6 (1d8 + 2) Slashing damage.

actions.name: Nightmare Breath 5
entries: wis DC 11, each creature in a 15-foot Cone [Area of Effect]. 7 (2d6) Psychic damage, and the target has the Frightened condition until the end of the dragon's next turn. {@actSaveSuccess Half damage only.

traits.name: Mechanical Determination
entries: If damage reduces the wonder to 0 Hit Points, it makes a Constitution saving throw with a DC of 5 plus the damage taken unless the damage is Lightning or from a Critical Hit. On a successful save, the wonder drops to 1 Hit Points instead.

traits.name: Wind-Up Operation
entries: The wonder has the Unconscious condition until another creature winds it with the wonder's unique key for 1 minute. Once wound, the wonder operates for 10 days or until a creature touches the wonder with its key as a Utilize action to deactivate it, after which the wonder has the Unconscious condition until it is wound again.

traits.name: Fey Ancestry
entries: The drow has Advantage on saving throws it makes to avoid or end the Charmed condition, and magic can't put the drow to sleep.

traits.name: Sunlight Sensitivity
entries: While in sunlight, the drow has Disadvantage on attack rolls.

spellcasting.name: Underdark Magic (3/Day)
entries: The drow casts Darkness, Faerie Fire, or Levitate (self only), requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 12).
3/day: Darkness, Faerie Fire, Levitate

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The drow makes two attacks using Shortsword or Drow Hand Crossbow in any combination

actions.name: Shortsword
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: 7, reach 5 ft. 11 (2d6 + 4) Piercing damage plus 10 (3d6) Poison damage.

actions.name: Drow Hand Crossbow
entries: Ranged Weapon Attack: 7, range 30/120 ft. 7 (1d6 + 4) Piercing damage, and the target makes a saving throw. con DC 15. The target has the Poisoned condition for 1 hour. While Poisoned in this way, the target also has the Unconscious condition. The target wakes up if it takes damage or if a creature within 5 feet of it takes an action to wake it.

traits.name: Fey Ancestry
entries: The drow has Advantage on saving throws it makes to avoid or end the Charmed condition, and magic can't put the drow to sleep.

traits.name: Sunlight Sensitivity
entries: While in sunlight, the drow has Disadvantage on attack rolls.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
entries: The drow casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Intelligence as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 14, 6 to hit with spell attacks):
At will: Dancing Lights, Mage Armor (included in AC), Mage Hand, Minor Illusion
1/day: Summon Fiend (demon only)

spellcasting.name: Underdark Magic (3/Day)
entries: The drow casts Faerie Fire or Misty Step, requiring no Material components and using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting.
3/day: Faerie Fire, Misty Step

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The drow makes three Abyssal Burst attacks.

actions.name: Abyssal Burst
entries: Melee Weapon or Ranged Weapon Attack: 6, reach 5 ft. or range 120 ft. 21 (4d8 + 3) Poison damage.

traits.name: Fey Ancestry
entries: The drow has Advantage on saving throws it makes to avoid or end the Charmed condition, and magic can't put the drow to sleep.

traits.name: Sunlight Sensitivity
entries: While in sunlight, the drow has Disadvantage on attack rolls.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
entries: The drow casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 11):
At will: Dancing Lights
1/day: Faerie Fire

actions.name: Rapier
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: 4, reach 5 ft. 6 (1d8 + 2) Piercing damage.

actions.name: Drow Hand Crossbow
entries: Ranged Weapon Attack: 4, range 30/120 ft. 4 (1d4 + 2) Piercing damage, and the target makes a saving throw. con DC 12. The target has the Poisoned condition for 1 hour. If the target fails the save by 5 or more, it also has the Unconscious condition while Poisoned in this way. The target wakes up if it takes damage or if a creature within 5 feet of it takes an action to wake it.

traits.name: Fey Ancestry
entries: The drow has Advantage on saving throws it makes to avoid or end the Charmed condition, and magic can't put the drow to sleep.

traits.name: Sunlight Sensitivity
entries: While in sunlight, the drow has Disadvantage on attack rolls.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
entries: The drow casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability:
At will: Dancing Lights, Guidance, Thaumaturgy

spellcasting.name: Lolth's Blessing (3/Day)
entries: The drow casts Cure Wounds, Darkness, Dispel Magic, or Lesser Restoration, using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting.
3/day: Cure Wounds, Darkness, Dispel Magic, Lesser Restoration

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The drow makes three Scourge attacks.

actions.name: Scourge
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: 5, reach 10 ft. 6 (1d6 + 3) Piercing damage plus 17 (5d6) Poison damage.

actions.name: Spider Vortex 5
entries: con DC 15, each enemy in a 20-foot Emanation [Area of Effect] originating from the drow. 33 (6d10) Piercing damage, and the target has the Restrained condition until the start of the drow's next turn. {@actSaveSuccess Half damage only.

traits.name: Increased Carrying Capacity
entries: The wonder can carry up to 100 pounds.

traits.name: Wind-Up Operation
entries: The wonder has the Unconscious condition until another creature winds it with the wonder's unique key for 1 minute. Once wound, the wonder operates for 24 hours or until a creature touches the wonder with its key as a Utilize action to deactivate it, after which the wonder has the Unconscious condition until it is wound again.

bonusActions.name: Chime
entries: The wonder chirps a merry, metronomic tune. The wonder chooses one ally that it can see within 60 feet. Until the start of the wonder's next turn, the target has Advantage on the next ability check it makes with a Musical Instrument or Tinker's Tools.

bonusActions.name: Sprint
entries: The wonder takes the Dash action.

traits.name: Evasion
entries: If Karas is subjected to an effect that allows her to make a Dexterity saving throw to take only half damage, Karas instead takes no damage if she succeeds on the save and only half damage if she fails. She can't use this trait if she has the Incapacitated condition.

traits.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day or 4/Day in Lair)
entries: If Karas fails a saving throw, she can choose to succeed instead.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
entries: Karas casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Intelligence as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 15, 7 to hit with spell attacks):
At will: Friends, Silence, Thaumaturgy
1/day: Blight, Mislead
2/day: Ray of Sickness (level 5 version)

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: Karas makes two attacks using Dread Dagger or Tyrant's Blade in any combination.

actions.name: Dread Dagger
entries: Melee Weapon or Ranged Weapon Attack: 8, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft. 10 (2d4 + 5) Piercing damage plus 4 (1d8) Necrotic damage. The dagger magically returns to Karas's hand immediately after a ranged attack.

actions.name: Tyrant's Blade
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: 8, reach 5 ft. 8 (1d6 + 5) Slashing damage, and the target has the Frightened condition until the start of Karas's next turn. If the target is already Frightened, it instead takes 10 (3d6) Psychic damage.

bonusActions.name: Withdraw
entries: Karas moves up to half her Speed without provoking Opportunity Attack action and takes the Hide action.

legendaryActions.name: Harrow
entries: wis DC 15, one creature Karas can see within 90 feet of herself. 10 (3d6) Psychic damage, and the target has the Frightened condition for 1 minute. While Frightened, the target's Speed is 0 feet, and it repeats the save at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on a success. {@actSaveSuccessOrFail Karas can't take this action again until the start of her next turn.

legendaryActions.name: Stealth Attack
entries: Karas makes one Dread Dagger attack and uses Withdraw.

traits.name: Magic Resistance
entries: Manshoon has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
entries: Manshoon casts one of the following spells, using Intelligence as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 19):
At will: Detect Magic, Detect Thoughts, Light, Lightning Bolt (level 4 version), Mage Armor (included in AC), Mage Hand, Prestidigitation
2e/day: Scrying, Sending, Wall of Force
1e/day: Befuddlement, Clone, Finger of Death, Mind Blank (cast before combat), Simulacrum

spellcasting.name: Misty Step
entries: Manshoon casts Misty Step, using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting.
At will: Misty Step

spellcasting.name: Protective Magic
entries: Manshoon casts Counterspell or Shield in response to the spell's trigger, using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting.
At will: Counterspell, Shield

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: Manshoon makes three Arcane Burst attacks. He can replace two attacks with a use of Spellcasting.

actions.name: Arcane Burst
entries: Melee Weapon or Ranged Weapon Attack: 11, reach 5 ft., or range 120 ft. 32 (4d12 + 6) Force damage.

name: Nimblewright Guard
languages: understands Common plus one other language but can't speak

traits.name: Evasion
entries: If the nimblewright is subjected to an effect that allows it to make a Dexterity saving throw to take only half damage, it instead takes no damage if it succeeds on the save and only half damage if it fails, provided it doesn't have the Incapacitated condition.

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The nimblewright makes three attacks, using Scimitar or Clockwork Crossbow in any combination.

actions.name: Scimitar
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: 6, reach 5 ft. 7 (1d6 + 4) Slashing damage.

actions.name: Clockwork Crossbow
entries: Ranged Weapon Attack: 6, range 80/320 ft. 8 (1d8 + 4) Piercing damage.

reactions.name: Parry
entries: The nimblewright is hit by a melee attack roll while holding a weapon. {@actResponse The nimblewright adds 2 to its AC against that attack, potentially causing it to miss.

name: Nimblewright Hulk
languages: understands Common plus one other language but can't speak

traits.name: Evasion
entries: If the nimblewright is subjected to an effect that allows it to make a Dexterity saving throw to take only half damage, it instead takes no damage if it succeeds on the save and only half damage if it fails, provided it doesn't have the Incapacitated condition.

traits.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The nimblewright has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The nimblewright makes four attacks, using Halting Slam or Radiant Ray in any combination.

actions.name: Halting Slam
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: 7, reach 10 ft. 15 (2d10 + 4) Bludgeoning damage, and the target's Speed is reduced to 0 until the end of its next turn.

actions.name: Radiant Ray
entries: Ranged Weapon Attack: 7, range 60 ft. 14 (4d6) Radiant damage.

name: Nimblewright Steed
languages: understands Common plus one other language but can't speak

traits.name: Evasion
entries: If the nimblewright is subjected to an effect that allows it to make a Dexterity saving throw to take only half damage, it instead takes no damage if it succeeds on the save and only half damage if it fails, provided it doesn't have the Incapacitated condition.

actions.name: Hooves
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: 6, reach 5 ft. 7 (1d8 + 3) Bludgeoning damage. If the nimblewright moved at least 20 feet straight toward the target immediately before the hit, the target takes an extra 4 (1d8) Bludgeoning damage and, if it is Huge or smaller, has the Prone condition.

bonusActions.name: Nimble Movement
entries: The nimblewright takes the Disengage action.

name: Phaerimm Agent
languages: telepathy 120 ft. understands Common and Deep Speech but can't speak

traits.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The phaerimm has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
entries: The phaerimm casts one of the following spells, requiring no spell components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 15):
At will: Detect Magic, Detect Thoughts, Mage Hand
1e/day: Clairvoyance, Major Image, Synaptic Static

spellcasting.name: Protective Magic (3/Day)
entries: The phaerimm casts Counterspell or Shield in response to the spell's trigger, using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting.
3/day: Counterspell, Shield

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The phaerimm makes three attacks, using Dread Stinger or Mindwarp Ray in any combination.

actions.name: Dread Stinger
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: 7, reach 5 ft. 7 (1d6 + 4) Piercing damage plus 13 (2d12) Poison damage.

actions.name: Mindwarp Ray
entries: Ranged Weapon Attack: 7, range 120 ft. 13 (2d8 + 4) Psychic damage, and the target has the Charmed condition until the start of the phaerimm's next turn.

bonusActions.name: Teleport
entries: The phaerimm teleports up to 30 feet to an unoccupied space it can see.

name: Phaerimm Hatchling
languages: telepathy 30 ft. understands Common and Deep Speech but can't speak

traits.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The phaerimm has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
entries: The phaerimm casts one of the following spells, requiring no spell components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 12):
At will: Detect Thoughts, Mage Hand

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The phaerimm makes two Stinger attacks.

actions.name: Stinger
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: 3, reach 5 ft. 3 (1d4 + 1) Piercing damage.

traits.name: Misty Slithering
entries: The serpent can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch without expending extra movement to do so.

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The serpent makes one Bite attack and uses Constrict.

actions.name: Bite
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: 6, reach 5 ft. 8 (1d8 + 4) Piercing damage plus 3 (1d6) Cold damage.

actions.name: Constrict
entries: str DC 14, one Medium or smaller creature the snake can see within 10 feet. 3 (1d6) Bludgeoning damage plus 7 (2d6) Cold damage. The target has the Grappled condition (escape DC 14), and it has the Restrained condition until the grapple ends.

traits.name: Inspiring Presence
entries: Creatures of Forfallen's choice (excluding herself) in a 30-foot Emanation [Area of Effect] originating from her have Advantage on attack rolls. She can't use this trait if she has the Incapacitated condition.

traits.name: Magic Resistance
entries: Forfallen has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: Forfallen makes three attacks, using Greataxe or Handaxe in any combination.

actions.name: Greataxe
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: 9, reach 5 ft. 18 (2d12 + 5) Slashing damage, and the target has the Poisoned condition until the end of its next turn.

actions.name: Handaxe
entries: Melee Weapon or Ranged Weapon Attack: 9, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft. 22 (5d6 + 5) Slashing damage.

bonusActions.name: Rust's Grip
entries: con DC 16, one creature Forfallen can see within 20 feet. The target has Disadvantage on this save if it has the Poisoned condition. 1 The target has the Restrained condition and repeats the save at the end of its next turn if it's still Restrained, ending the effect on itself on a success. 2 The target has the Petrified condition instead of the Restrained condition, becoming a statue of rusted iron.

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The Rusted makes three attacks, using Slam or Rusted Shot Put in any combination.

actions.name: Slam
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: 10, reach 10 ft. 20 (4d6 + 6) Bludgeoning damage.

actions.name: Rusted Shot Put
entries: Ranged Weapon Attack: 10, range 60/240 ft. 15 (2d8 + 6) Bludgeoning damage, and the target has the Poisoned condition until the end of its next turn.

reactions.name: Rust-Riddled Hide
entries: The Rusted is hit by an attack roll that deals Bludgeoning, Piercing, or Slashing damage. the target has the Poisoned condition until the end of the target's next turn.

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The Rusted makes two attacks, using Greatsword or Javelin in any combination.

actions.name: Greatsword
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: 6, reach 5 ft. 11 (2d6 + 4) Slashing damage, and the target has the Poisoned condition until the end of its next turn.

actions.name: Javelin
entries: Melee Weapon or Ranged Weapon Attack: 6, reach 5 ft. or range 30/120 ft. 11 (2d6 + 4) Piercing damage, and the target has the Poisoned condition until the end of its next turn.

traits.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day)
entries: If the Rusted fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The Rusted makes two Bite attacks.

actions.name: Bite
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: 12, reach 20 ft. 29 (4d10 + 7) Piercing damage.

actions.name: Steam Breath 5
entries: dex DC 19, each creature and flammable object that isn't being worn or carried in a 60-foot Cone [Area of Effect]. 45 (7d12) Fire damage, and the target starts {@hazard burning. Half damage only. {@actSaveSuccessOrFail Being underwater doesn't grant Resistance to this Fire damage.

bonusActions.name: Encasing Rust
entries: con DC 19, one creature within 20 feet of the Rusted. 14 (4d6) Poison damage, and the target has the Poisoned condition until the end of its next turn. While Poisoned, the target has the Paralyzed condition.

name: Sammaster (Dracolich Form)
speed: walk 40 ft., burrow 30 ft., fly 80 ft.
senses: Blindsight 60 ft., Darkvision 120 ft., passive Perception 26

traits.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day)
entries: If Sammaster fails a saving throw, he can choose to succeed instead.

traits.name: Life Suppression
entries: Creatures within 60 feet of Sammaster can't regain Hit Points.

traits.name: Magic Resistance
entries: Sammaster has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

traits.name: Soul Gem
entries: Sammaster has a magical soul gem as his dracolich heart. The gem can't be damaged or removed until he is reduced to 0 Hit Points. If Sammaster is reduced to 0 Hit Points, his dracolich form dissolves to dust. After 1d10 days, he appears in an unoccupied space within 5 feet of his soul gem (so long as the gem still exists), using the Sammaster (Lich Form) stat block. The gem is a Tiny object that has AC 20; HP 50; and Immunity to Acid, Necrotic, Poison, and Psychic damage. The gem regains all its Hit Points at the end of every turn, but it turns to dust if reduced to 0 Hit Points.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
entries: Sammaster casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Intelligence as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 21, 13 to hit with spell attacks):
At will: Blight, Detect Magic, Dispel Magic, Mage Hand, Prestidigitation, Ray of Sickness (level 6 version)
2e/day: Dimension Door, Speak with Dead
1e/day: Create Undead (level 8 version), Power Word Kill

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: Sammaster makes three Rend attacks. He can replace one attack with a use of Spellcasting to cast Blight or Ray of Sickness (level 6 version).

actions.name: Rend
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: 14, reach 10 ft. 18 (2d10 + 7) Slashing damage plus 18 (4d8) Necrotic damage.

actions.name: Corroding Breath 5
entries: con DC 20, each creature in a 90-foot Cone [Area of Effect]. 52 (8d12) Acid or Necrotic damage (Sammaster's choice). {@actSaveSuccess Half damage.

legendaryActions.name: Pounce
entries: Sammaster moves up to half his Speed, and he makes one Rend attack.

legendaryActions.name: Sickening Ray
entries: Sammaster uses Spellcasting to cast Ray of Sickness (level 6 version).

legendaryActions.name: Terrifying Presence
entries: wis DC 21, each creature in a 20-foot Emanation [Area of Effect] originating from Sammaster. 13 (2d12) Psychic damage, and the target has the Frightened condition until the end of its next turn. {@actSaveSuccessOrFail Sammaster can't take this action again until the start of his next turn.

name: Sammaster (Lich Form)
senses: Blindsight 60 ft., Darkvision 120 ft., passive Perception 19

traits.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day)
entries: If Sammaster fails a saving throw, he can choose to succeed instead.

traits.name: Life Suppression
entries: Creatures within 60 feet of Sammaster can't regain Hit Points.

traits.name: Magic Resistance
entries: Sammaster has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

traits.name: Soul Gem
entries: If Sammaster is reduced to 0 Hit Points while his magical soul gem exists, his lich form dissolves to dust. After 1d10 days, he appears in the space of his soul gem, using the Sammaster (Dracolich Form) stat block. The gem is a Tiny object that has AC 20; HP 50; and Immunity to Acid, Necrotic, Poison, and Psychic damage. The gem regains all its Hit Points at the end of every turn, but it turns to dust if reduced to 0 Hit Points. If the gem is destroyed, Sammaster can create a new one by completing an 8-hour ritual using a gem worth 1,000+ GP, which the ritual consumes, and by expending 5,000 GP.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
entries: Sammaster casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Intelligence as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 21):
At will: Cone of Cold, Detect Magic, Dispel Magic, Invisibility, Mage Hand, Prestidigitation
2e/day: Speak with Dead, Wall of Force
1e/day: Create Undead (level 8 version), Disintegrate, Power Word Kill

spellcasting.name: Protective Magic
entries: Sammaster casts Counterspell or Shield in response to the spell's trigger, using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting.
At will: Counterspell, Shield

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: Sammaster makes three attacks, using Corrosive Burst or Paralyzing Touch in any combination. He can replace two attacks with a use of Spellcasting.

actions.name: Corrosive Burst
entries: Melee Weapon or Ranged Weapon Attack: 13, reach 5 ft. or range 120 ft. 38 (5d12 + 6) Acid or Necrotic damage (Sammaster's choice).

actions.name: Paralyzing Touch
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: 13, reach 5 ft. 16 (3d6 + 6) Cold damage, and the target has the Paralyzed condition until the start of Sammaster's next turn.

legendaryActions.name: Deathly Teleport
entries: Sammaster teleports up to 60 feet to an unoccupied space he can see, and each creature within 10 feet of the space he left takes 19 (3d12) Necrotic damage.

legendaryActions.name: Dissolve
entries: Sammaster makes one Corrosive Burst attack.

legendaryActions.name: Terrifying Presence
entries: wis DC 21, each creature in a 20-foot Emanation [Area of Effect] originating from Sammaster. 13 (2d12) Psychic damage, and the target has the Frightened condition until the end of its next turn. {@actSaveSuccessOrFail Sammaster can't take this action again until the start of his next turn.

name: Spirit Dragon Wyrmling
speed: walk 30 ft., burrow 20 ft., fly 60 ft.
senses: Blindsight 10 ft., Darkvision 60 ft., passive Perception 12

actions.name: Rend
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: 4, reach 5 ft. 9 (2d6 + 2) Slashing damage plus 3 (1d6) Necrotic damage.

actions.name: Ruinous Breath 5
entries: con DC 12, each creature in a 15-foot Cone [Area of Effect]. 13 (3d8) Necrotic damage. {@actSaveSuccess Half damage.

actions.name: Time-Warping Breath
entries: wis DC 12, each creature that isn't currently affected by this breath in a 15-foot Cone [Area of Effect]. The target's Speed is halved, it can't take Reactions, and it can take either an action or a Bonus Action on its turn, not both. It repeats the save at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. After 1 minute, it succeeds automatically.

traits.name: Explosive Core
entries: When the spore is subjected to Fire damage, each creature in a 5-foot Emanation [Area of Effect] originating from the spore takes 7 (2d6) Fire damage.

traits.name: Rolling Mass
entries: The spore doesn't need to expend extra movement to move through Difficult Terrain.

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The spore makes four Tendril attacks. Alternatively, it makes two Tendril attacks and uses Consume once.

actions.name: Tendril
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: 10, reach 20 ft. 11 (1d10 + 6) Piercing damage plus 10 (3d6) Acid damage. If the target is Large or smaller, the spore pulls the target 5 feet straight toward itself.

actions.name: Consume
entries: str DC 18, one Large or smaller creature within 5 feet. The target is pulled into the spore's space and has the Grappled condition (escape DC 16). Until the grapple ends, the target has the Blinded and Restrained conditions, and it takes 17 (5d6) Acid damage at the start of each of the spore's turns. When the spore moves, the Grappled target moves with it, costing it no extra movement. The spore can have one Large creature or up to nine Medium or smaller creatures Grappled at a time.

name: Swanmay
speed: walk 30 ft., fly 40 ft. (swan form only)

traits.name: Flyby (Swan Form Only)
entries: The swanmay doesn't provoke an Opportunity Attack action when it flies out of an enemy's reach.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
entries: The swanmay casts one of the following spells, requiring no Somatic or Material components and using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 13):
At will: Druidcraft, Speak with Animals (swan form only)
1e/day: Animal Friendship, Beast Sense, Spike Growth

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The swanmay makes two attacks, using Beak, Longbow, or Scimitar in any combination.

actions.name: Beak (Swan Form Only)
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: 6, reach 5 ft. 7 (1d6 + 4) Piercing damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the Prone condition.

actions.name: Scimitar (Humanoid Form Only)
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: 6, reach 5 ft. 11 (2d6 + 4) Slashing damage.

actions.name: Longbow (Humanoid Form Only)
entries: Ranged Weapon Attack: 6, range 150/600 ft. 13 (2d8 + 4) Piercing damage.

bonusActions.name: Shape-Shift
entries: The swanmay shape-shifts into a Small swan, or it returns to its true humanoid form. Its game statistics are the same in each form, except where noted. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying isn't transformed.

traits.name: Legendary Resistance (4/Day or 5/Day in Lair)
entries: If Valindra fails a saving throw, she can choose to succeed instead.

traits.name: Spirit Gem
entries: If destroyed, Valindra re-forms in 1d10 days if her spirit gem is intact, reviving with all her Hit Points. The new body appears in an unoccupied space within her lair.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
entries: Valindra casts one of the following spells, using Intelligence as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 20):
At will: Detect Magic, Detect Thoughts, Dispel Magic, Fly, Invisibility, Lightning Bolt (level 5 version), Mage Hand, Prestidigitation
2e/day: Animate Dead, Plane Shift
1e/day: Cone of Cold (level 8 version), Finger of Death, Power Word Kill, Scrying

spellcasting.name: Illusory Disguise
entries: Valindra casts Disguise Self, using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting. The spell lasts until Valindra drops to 30 Hit Points or fewer or uses her Life-Rending Gaze Legendary Action. Intelligence (Investigation) checks made to discern her true appearance are made with Disadvantage.
At will: Disguise Self

spellcasting.name: Protective Magic
entries: Valindra casts Counterspell or Shield in response to the spell's trigger, using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting.
At will: Counterspell, Shield

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: Valindra makes three attacks, using Eldritch Burst or Paralyzing Touch in any combination. She can replace two attacks with a use of Spellcasting to cast Lightning Bolt (level 5 version).

actions.name: Eldritch Burst
entries: Melee Weapon or Ranged Weapon Attack: 12, reach 5 ft. or range 120 ft. 31 (4d12 + 5) Force damage.

actions.name: Paralyzing Touch
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: 12, reach 5 ft. 14 (2d8 + 5) Cold damage, and the target has the Paralyzed condition until the start of Valindra's next turn.

actions.name: Deathly Grasp 5
entries: dex DC 20, each creature in a 30-foot Emanation [Area of Effect] originating from Valindra. 1 39 (6d12) Force damage and the target has the Restrained condition and repeats the save at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. After 1 minute, it succeeds automatically. Subsequent Failures: 39 (6d12) Necrotic damage, and Valindra gains 20 Temporary Hit Points.

legendaryActions.name: Disrupt Life
entries: con DC 20, each creature that isn't Undead in a 20-foot Emanation [Area of Effect] originating from Valindra. 21 (6d6) Necrotic damage. Valindra can't take this action again until the start of her next turn.

legendaryActions.name: Eldritch Jaunt
entries: Valindra makes one Eldritch Burst attack. Before or after the attack, Valindra can teleport up to 20 feet to an unoccupied space she can see.

legendaryActions.name: Life-Rending Gaze
entries: wis DC 20, one creature Valindra can see within 30 feet. 22 (4d10) Necrotic damage, and the target has the Frightened condition until the end of its next turn. {@actSaveSuccess Half damage only.

name: Werewyvern
speed: walk 30 ft., fly 40 ft. (wyvern or hybrid form only)
languages: Common, Draconic (can't speak in wyvern form)

traits.name: Flyby (Wyvern or Hybrid Form Only)
entries: The werewyvern doesn't provoke an Opportunity Attack action when it flies out of an enemy's reach.

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The werewyvern makes three attacks, using Javelin or Rend in any combination. It can replace one of these attacks with one Stinger attack.

actions.name: Javelin (Humanoid or Hybrid Form Only)
entries: Melee Weapon or Ranged Weapon Attack: 7, reach 5 ft. or range 30/120 ft. 18 (4d6 + 4) Piercing damage.

actions.name: Rend
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: 7, reach 5 ft. 18 (4d6 + 4) Slashing damage.

actions.name: Stinger (Wyvern or Hybrid Form Only)
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: 7, reach 5 ft. 7 (1d6 + 4) Piercing damage plus 16 (3d10) Poison damage, and the target has the Poisoned condition until the start of the werewyvern's next turn. If the target is a Humanoid, it is subjected to the following effect. con DC 16. The target is cursed. If the cursed target drops to 0 Hit Points, it instead becomes a Werewyvern under the DM's control and has 20 Hit Points. {@actSaveSuccess The target is immune to this werewyvern's curse for 24 hours.

bonusActions.name: Shape-Shift
entries: The werewyvern shape-shifts into a Medium wyvern-humanoid hybrid or a Large wyvern, or it returns to its true humanoid form. Its game statistics, other than its size, are the same in each form. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying isn't transformed.

name: Young Deep Dragon
speed: walk 40 ft., burrow 20 ft., fly 80 ft., swim 40 ft.
senses: Blindsight 30 ft., Darkvision 150 ft., passive Perception 18

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The dragon makes three Rend attacks.

actions.name: Rend
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: 7, reach 10 ft. 11 (2d6 + 4) Slashing damage plus 3 (1d6) Poison damage.

actions.name: Nightmare Breath 5
entries: wis DC 14, each creature in a 30-foot Cone [Area of Effect]. 22 (4d10) Psychic damage, and the target has the Frightened condition until the end of the dragon's next turn. {@actSaveSuccess Half damage only.

name: Young Spirit Dragon
speed: walk 40 ft., burrow 30 ft., fly 80 ft.
senses: Blindsight 30 ft., Darkvision 120 ft., passive Perception 15

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The dragon makes three Rend attacks. It can replace one attack with a use of Time-Warping Breath.

actions.name: Rend
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: 7, reach 10 ft. 14 (3d6 + 4) Slashing damage plus 7 (2d6) Necrotic damage.

actions.name: Ruinous Breath 5
entries: con DC 15, each creature in a 30-foot Cone [Area of Effect]. 36 (8d8) Necrotic damage. {@actSaveSuccess Half damage.

actions.name: Time-Warping Breath
entries: wis DC 15, each creature that isn't currently affected by this breath in a 30-foot Cone [Area of Effect]. The target's Speed is halved, it can't take Reactions, and it can take either an action or a Bonus Action on its turn, not both. It repeats the save at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. After 1 minute, it succeeds automatically.

traits.name: Aura of Dread
entries: Creatures in a 10-foot Emanation [Area of Effect] originating from the Zhentilar have their Speeds halved while in the Emanation [Area of Effect]. The Zhentilar can designate creatures to be unaffected by the aura.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
entries: The Zhentilar casts one of the following spells, using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 13):
1e/day: Command, Fear

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The Zhentilar makes three attacks, using Dooming Blade or Oppressive Ray in any combination. It can replace one attack with a use of Spellcasting.

actions.name: Dooming Blade
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: 5, reach 5 ft. 7 (1d8 + 3) Bludgeoning damage plus 7 (2d6) Necrotic damage.

actions.name: Oppressive Ray
entries: Ranged Weapon Attack: 5, range 90 ft. 16 (3d10) Psychic damage.

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The Zhentilar makes two attacks, using Shortsword or Pistol in any combination. It can replace one attack with a use of Knock Down.

actions.name: Shortsword
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: 4, reach 5 ft. 5 (1d6 + 2) Piercing damage plus 2 (1d4) Poison damage.

actions.name: Pistol
entries: Ranged Weapon Attack: 4, range 80/320 ft. 7 (1d10 + 2) Piercing damage.

actions.name: Knock Down
entries: str DC 12, one creature within 5 feet that the Zhentilar can see. 4 (1d4 + 2) Bludgeoning damage. If the target is a Medium or smaller creature, it has the Prone condition.

traits.name: Chardalyn Sense
entries: Zlan senses the emotions of anyone touching a piece of chardalyn within 100 miles of itself.

traits.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day)
entries: If Zlan fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

traits.name: Magic Resistance
entries: Zlan has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

traits.name: Next of the Seven (6/Year)
entries: If Zlan dies within 100 miles of a piece of chardalyn at least 4 inches long, it re-forms from that piece of chardalyn in 1d10 days, regaining all its Hit Points. The new body appears in the unoccupied space nearest to the piece of chardalyn, and another lich's mind in the body seizes psychic control of the body.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
entries: Zlan casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Intelligence as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 19):
At will: Detect Magic, Detect Thoughts, Dispel Magic, Mage Hand, Message
2e/day: Dimension Door, Fly, Scrying
1e/day: Befuddlement, Disintegrate

spellcasting.name: Counterspell
entries: Zlan casts Counterspell in response to the spell's trigger, using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting.
At will: Counterspell

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: Zlan makes three attacks, using Slam or Bewildering Bolt in any combination. It can replace two attacks with a use of Spellcasting.

actions.name: Slam
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: 11, reach 10 ft. 12 (3d4 + 5) Bludgeoning damage plus 22 (4d10) Necrotic damage.

actions.name: Bewildering Bolt
entries: Ranged Weapon Attack: 11, range 120 ft. 27 (4d10 + 5) Psychic damage, and the target has the Charmed condition until the end of its next turn.

legendaryActions.name: Retaliation
entries: Zlan makes one Slam or Bewildering Bolt attack.

legendaryActions.name: Stoke Paranoia
entries: wis DC 19, one creature Zlan can see within 30 feet (with Disadvantage if the target is holding or wearing chardalyn). 27 (6d8) Psychic damage and the target has the Charmed condition for 1 minute or until Zlan dies. While Charmed, the target doesn't act as an ally to any creature. Zlan can't take this action again until the start of its next turn.
